site.name: Eshwar Kingrani
site.description: Welcome to my digital realm! I'm passionate about pushing the boundaries of artificial intelligence and technology. With a vision for the future and expertise in cutting-edge AI solutions, I help businesses and individuals harness the power of tomorrow's technology today.

about.whoAmI: Hi, I am Eshwar Washdev Kingrani, a passionate student and aspiring tech entrepreneur from Karachi, Sindh, Pakistan. I am currently studying in 12th class under the Board of Intermediate and Secondary Education Larkana. I achieved an A star in my matric and scored 91 percent in my 11th class.
about.background: I am also a former cadet. I studied my 7th, 8th and 9th classes at Cadet College Karampur. During this time, I served as the second class representative in 7th class, supporting the main CR, and later became the class representative in both 8th and 9th classes. My time at cadet college helped me develop strong skills in public speaking, discipline, leadership and management. I was also honored with the Speaker of the Year award in English.
about.vision: I aim to specialize in Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security in the future. Alongside my board education, I am currently learning networking to strengthen my technical foundation. I believe in continuous learning and improving myself every day.
about.work: I have skills in graphic designing, basic networking and more. I have worked on many projects. While several of my projects did not go as planned and failed in the middle, many of them were successful and helped me learn and grow. I have created this website myself and also developed a custom business management software for my father's business.

book.title: Zero to Hero Tech
book.author: Eshwar Kingrani
book.description: Transform your tech knowledge from beginner to expert. A comprehensive guide to understanding technology, AI, and cybersecurity in simple English.
book.intro: Technology is changing our world faster than ever. From mobile phones to artificial intelligence, everything around us is becoming smart. But not everyone understands how it works or how to use it safely. That's why this book was written in very simple English so that anyone, even a beginner, can learn the real meaning of technology.
book.goal: To turn you from a technology user into a technology creator. From someone who only uses apps to someone who can understand, build, and protect them. This is not just a book about computers. It's about how you can grow in this digital age.
book.authorMessage: My name is Eshwar Kingrani, and I wrote this book (my first book) to make technology simple for everyone. When I first started learning about computers, coding, and AI, I was confused - everything looked so hard and full of big words. But when I understood it step by step, I realized one thing: Technology is not difficult - it's just explained in a difficult way. That's why I created "Zero to Hero Tech" - a book written in very simple English, for students, dreamers, and young minds who want to learn how technology really works. This book is more than just information - it's a journey from being a user to becoming a creator. It will show you how to use AI, coding, and cybersecurity in the right way with purpose, creativity, and ethics.
book.quote: AI should not replace your brain - it should extend it.
